videos.title: Shouting at Stars: A History of Interstellar Messages
The Kennedy Assassination: Inside the Book Depository
The Enduring Mystery of Jack the Ripper

duration_trend.note: Strong upward trend: the 4 most recent uploads (2022-2025) run roughly 2.7x longer on average than the 4 oldest in this sample (2021-2023). Driven mainly by the two feature-length outliers (Kennedy Assassination 1:38:11, Shouting at Stars 2:27:36). Two of the 8 are short-form Q&A milestone videos (10-17 min) and one is a <3min charity video (Seas #TeamSeas), so the trend is 'fewer but much longer flagship documentaries' rather than a uniform creep upward. Cadence is also very irregular (gaps range 50 to 545 days) -- consistent with a quality-over-quantity, no-fixed-schedule posting style.

palette_trend: Consistently dark/desaturated base (near-black, deep navy/purple night sky, muted brown/tan) with exactly one saturated accent hue driving the whole thumbnail -- e.g. teal-green light beam against purple starscape (Shouting at Stars), blood-red glowing typography on black (Kryptos), red-silhouetted figure against a dark blue window (Kennedy Assassination). Flat, minimal vector-illustration style, no photographic faces, no clutter of text/arrows. Very stable identity across years -- no discernible drift toward higher-contrast/primary-color YouTube-thumbnail norms that most channels chase.
